instruction: Three things wrong with the bookmark icon: the base outline is orange, the red side stripe is cyan (wrong color), AND the red side stripe has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bookmark.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #f97316" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M19 21l-7-5-7 5V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h10a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#06b6d4" x="6" y="10" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bookmark.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M19 21l-7-5-7 5V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h10a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
